display.purpose: Hero headings and pattern detail H1 only.

title.purpose: Card titles, subsection headers, navigation labels.

body.purpose: All running text, descriptions, and explanations.

mono.purpose: Code blocks, inline code, and rank numbers.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all interactive state transitions on buttons, links, and form controls.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, and active state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main call-to-action. Violet Wire solid fill with dark text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #a78bfa; color: #0f0f12; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 12px 32px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(167,139,250,0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a78bfa; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Neutral alternative. Dark surface with border, used for back navigation and cancel actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #18181c; color: #e8e8ed; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 12px 24px; border: 1px solid #2e2e35; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #222228; border-color: #a78bfa; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a78bfa; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Filter Pill
components.description: Category filter toggle for pattern listing. Color-matches the active category.
components.css: .ds-filter-pill { background: transparent; color: #6b6b75; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-filter-pill:hover { color: #9898a3; } .ds-filter-pill-active { background: #18181c; border: 1px solid #2e2e35; color: #22d3ee; } .ds-filter-pill:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a78bfa; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Pattern Card
components.description: The signature container for each design pattern. Fixed structure, variable content.
components.html:
#1

Singleton

creational

Ensure a class has only one instance

Difficulty★☆☆☆☆
components.css: .ds-card-pattern { position: relative; background: #18181c; border: 1px solid rgba(34,211,238,0.3); border-radius: 16px; padding: 28px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-card-pattern:hover { border-color: rgba(34,211,238,0.5); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(34,211,238,0.15); transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-card-rank { position: absolute; top: 20px; right: 20px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', Consolas, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #6b6b75; } .ds-card-icon { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(34,211,238,0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 20px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #e8e8ed; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-category { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #22d3ee; text-transform: capitalize; } .ds-card-tagline { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #9898a3; line-height: 1.7; margin: 16px 0 20px 0; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-footer { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding-top: 8px; } .ds-card-label { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #6b6b75; } .ds-card-stars { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #22d3ee; }

components.name: Navbar Brand
components.description: Fixed top navigation bar with glass-like depth.
components.html: GoF PatternsAll PatternsLearning Path
components.css: .ds-navbar { position: fixed; top: 0; width: 100%; height: 64px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 24px; background: rgba(15,15,18,0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px); border-bottom: 1px solid #2e2e35; z-index: 50; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-navbar-brand { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: #e8e8ed; } .ds-navbar-accent { color: #a78bfa; } .ds-navbar-link { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #9898a3; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-navbar-link:hover { color: #e8e8ed; } .ds-navbar-link-active { color: #e8e8ed; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Code Block
components.description: Syntax-highlighted Java code example with title header.
components.html:
Basic Implementation

Thread-safe lazy initialization

public class Singleton {
  private static Singleton instance;
  private Singleton() {}
  public static Singleton getInstance() {
    if (instance == null) {
      instance = new Singleton();
    }
    return instance;
  }
}
components.css: .ds-code-block { border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-code-header { background: #18181c; border: 1px solid #2e2e35; border-bottom: none; padding: 16px 20px; border-radius: 16px 16px 0 0; } .ds-code-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #e8e8ed; margin: 0; } .ds-code-desc { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #6b6b75; margin: 4px 0 0 0; } .ds-code-body { border: 1px solid #2e2e35; border-top: none; border-radius: 0 0 16px 16px; overflow: hidden; background: #0f0f12; } .ds-code-pre { margin: 0; padding: 20px; overflow-x: auto; } .ds-code { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', Consolas, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #e8e8ed; tab-size: 2; }

components.name: Metaphor Callout
components.description: Real-world metaphor explanation card with accent icon.
components.html:
Real-World Metaphor: The Government

Just like a country has only one government at a time, a Singleton ensures only one instance exists.
components.css: .ds-metaphor { background: #18181c; border: 1px solid #2e2e35; border-radius: 16px; padding: 32px; } .ds-metaphor-heading { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #e8e8ed; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin: 0 0 20px 0; } .ds-metaphor-text { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; color: #9898a3; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: A field guide works in two modes: quick identification in the wild and deep study back at the desk. The visual system serves both — scannable at speed, rewarding on sustained attention. Every pattern gets the same structural treatment so by pattern #3 you've learned the language; by pattern #23 you read it fluently. The system is precise, calm, authoritative. It assumes the user is capable: explanations are thorough, never remedial. The dark surface recedes so the three category colors carry the only color on the page, and they carry it deliberately. This is not gamified, not SaaS, not terminal-native. No badges. No gradient CTAs. The reading experience has warmth and hierarchy; the dark background is chosen because code reads better on dark surfaces, not because "tools look cool dark."
keyCharacteristics: Three category colors carry all semantic meaning; everything else is neutral
Flat at rest, ambient glow on hover — depth is a response, not a default
Inter for everything except code; JetBrains Mono for code blocks and rank badges
Generous whitespace, restrained motion, purposeful color
One structure repeated across 23 patterns so the system teaches itself

rules.name: The Three-Color Rule
rules.body: Only Aqua Signal, Violet Wire, and Signal Green appear as colored elements on any page. Ember is reserved for warnings and errors. No other hues enter the palette.

rules.name: The Ten-Percent Rule
rules.body: No category color occupies more than 10% of the visible surface at any scroll position. Their impact comes from scarcity.

rules.name: The Same-Four-Places Rule
rules.body: Each category color appears in exactly four locations: icon block, category label, difficulty indicator, hover border.

rules.name: The Single-Family Rule
rules.body: Inter is the only typeface for prose. Weight (400/500/600/700) carries all hierarchy. JetBrains Mono is reserved for code and rank numbers.

rules.name: The Code-Width Rule
rules.body: Code blocks are limited to 80 characters per line. The code font and container width are set together so no line wraps in a block that fits the viewport at 1024px+.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Cards, sections, and containers are flat at rest. Glows appear only as a response to hover. No element ships with a permanent shadow.

rules.name: The One-Elevated-Layer Rule
rules.body: Only the navbar uses persistent z-axis elevation. Everything else shares the page plane until hover.

dos: Use the three category colors in exactly four places per pattern: icon block, category label, difficulty indicator, hover border.
Keep pattern card structure identical across all 23 patterns. The system teaches itself through repetition.
Use Graphite (#18181c) as the surface for all cards, code blocks, and sections. One surface color, consistent everywhere.
Limit body text to 65-75 characters per line. Dark backgrounds need tighter measures than light ones for sustained reading.
Pair every interactive element with a visible focus ring (2px Violet Wire, 2px offset).
Respect reduced motion: all animations degrade to crossfade or instant transition.
Use border + tonal shift for depth at rest. Shadows and glows are hover-only responses.
Use Inter weight (400/500/600/700) as the sole typographic hierarchy mechanism.
donts: Don't introduce new hues. The four named colors are the complete palette.
Don't use gradient text beyond the hero 'Gang of Four' signature.
Don't add gamification elements: no badges, XP, streaks, progress bars, confetti, or 'level up' language.
Don't use shadows at rest. If a card has a permanent drop shadow, it's wrong.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as colored accent stripes.
Don't apply border-radius above 16px to cards or sections.
Don't use glassmorphism beyond the navbar's functional backdrop blur.
Don't add enterprise/tutorial aesthetic: no Oracle-style boxes-and-arrows, no 2000s beige backgrounds.
